name: Easy Chicken & Dumplings
recipeIngredient: Few drops of yellow food coloring
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chicken in a large pot filled about 3/4 full of water.
2. Cook until tender. Remove the chicken and debone, or leave it without deboning if preferred.
3. Add the remaining ingredients (except the tortillas) back into the boiling broth.
4. Cut the flour tortillas into strips using kitchen shears.
5. Drop the tortilla strips into the boiling broth.
6. Cook for about 20 minutes, or until done.
This recipe makes a large quantity and can be halved if desired.
